name: Kool Aid Play Dough #1
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the Kool-Aid, flour, salt, and alum together.
2. Gradually add the boiled water and oil to the mixture.
3. Stir until well combined.
4. Knead the dough with your hands until smooth and no longer sticky.
5. If the play dough is too sticky, add a little more flour, one teaspoon at a time, until it reaches the desired consistency.
6. Allow the play dough to cool before using.
Note: A pre-school director has confirmed that this recipe is used by her students, who love it and find it not sticky and pleasant smelling.
